welcoming and professional unfortunately we were given a truly terrible table right by the restaurants entrance next to the staff station and kitchen window everyone entering or leaving walked right past us making me feel extremely uncomfortable with plenty of empty tables available ill never understand why we were seated thereespecially since we had booked two hours in advance as for the food i had coconut rice and fried tofu with cheese sauce sadly the sauce barely resembled cheese and had a strange sweetness to it not my taste at all the rice was simply plain rice inside a coconut shellnice presentation but bland flavor i had to ask for soy sauce just to make it edible it felt like being in japan where salt seems to be banned from kitchens another letdown no beer available only juices coffee tea and soda why no beer i dont get it all in all it wasnt the experience i was hoping for i probably wont returnunless my wife forces me to italiano abbiamo prenotato un tavolo per tre
